top_signals.title: Stocks Advance as Chip Rally Builds, Brent Climbs: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Chip stocks extended a global rally as investors renewed bets that the artificial intelligence trade has further room to run. Oil climbed on pessimism over US-Iran peace talks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: In Gaza, a mother’s hunt for water lays bare a worsening health crisis
top_signals.summary: Gaza is facing an unprecedented collapse of its water and sanitation systems, warn aid agencies, U.N. officials and Palestinian ​health authorities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘Litany of failures’ behind Hong Kong’s worst tragedy in decades
top_signals.summary: Report on fire that killed 168 people points to ‘unscrupulous’ contractors and ‘systemic’ issues with regulation
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
